rows.visible: Program ID, player/session PDA domains, PlayerProfile and PlayerSession account magic, source path programs/nicechunk_player/src/lib.rs, and session authority role are documented.
rows.missing: Session expiry fixtures, signer mismatch negative logs, equipped backpack account samples, and deployment authority evidence.

rows.title: World mutation and broken block program
rows.visible: Program ID, chunk and chunk-broken seeds, ChunkState magic NCKCHK01, ChunkBroken magic NCBK, max record count, and source path programs/nicechunk_chunk/src/lib.rs are public.
rows.missing: Canonical mined-coordinate fixtures, duplicate mining transaction logs, MagicBlock delegation evidence, and account byte decoders for large chunk records.

rows.title: Portable inventory program
rows.visible: Program ID, backpack seed, NCKBPK01 magic, default capacity 50, max capacity 99, 10-byte resource records, and source path programs/nicechunk_backpack/src/lib.rs are listed.
rows.missing: Append/remove invariant tests, over-capacity logs, transfer/escrow fixtures, rent sizing proof, and decoded account samples after mining.

rows.title: Region availability and guardian program
rows.visible: Program ID, guardian-registry, guardian-region, guardian-treasury seeds, registry/region account sizes, stake amount, proof interval, and source path programs/nicechunk_guardian/src/lib.rs are public.
rows.missing: Endpoint proof fixtures, outage simulation logs, staking treasury authority evidence, slashing policy tests, and non-custody failure cases.

rows.title: Listing and NCK settlement program
rows.visible: Program ID, listing and market-authority seeds, NCKMKT01 magic, v3 listing size, SOL/NCK currency support, source inventory fields, and source path programs/nicechunk_market/src/lib.rs are documented.
rows.missing: Escrow binary traces, NCK token-account negative logs, buy/cancel account diffs, fee policy proof, and sold-state replay fixtures.

decoder.title: Public account state should be readable without trusting the UI.
decoder.body: NiceChunk account data is most credible when reviewers can decode raw bytes, verify magic and version, check owner and PDA assumptions, then compare the decoded state against the website and wallet transaction history.

rows.title: GlobalConfig account
rows.layout: NCKCFG01, v1, 293 bytes; seed global-config; carries NCK mint, world id, world seed, rule hashes, chunk/build bounds, and guardian parameters.
rows.checks: Check program owner, PDA seed, magic, version, exact length, world id, NCK mint, rule hashes, chunk size, build limits, and guardian constants.
rows.use: Proves whether the public website and game client are reading the same canonical world parameters.

rows.title: PlayerProfile account
rows.layout: NCKPLY01, v1, 449 bytes; legacy length 417; owner offset 12; global config 44; position 78; equipment 103; equipped backpack 393.
rows.checks: Check owner wallet, global config link, supported length, equipment slots, equipped backpack key, created slot, and updated slot.
rows.use: Verifies wallet identity, visible equipment, and whether the player can mine into a bound backpack.

rows.title: PlayerSession account
rows.layout: NCKSES01, v1, 184 bytes; owner 12; session authority 44; player profile 76; global config 108; allowed actions 142; expires_at 144.
rows.checks: Check session authority signer, profile and global config links, action mask, expiry, max actions, and action count.
rows.use: Separates short-lived gameplay authority from long-lived wallet ownership.

rows.title: ChunkState account
rows.layout: NCKCHK01, v1, 8,280 bytes; header 88; up to 128 block deltas at 64 bytes each; keyed by world id, chunk_x, and chunk_z.
rows.checks: Check global config, world id, chunk_x, chunk_z, delta counters, capacity, created slot, and updated slot.
rows.use: Verifies player-authored block changes without storing the generated terrain blob.

rows.title: ChunkBrokenState account
rows.layout: NCBK, v1, variable length; header 16; records 3 bytes; max capacity 2,048; packs local_x, local_z, and y_offset from min_y.
rows.checks: Check min_y, count <= capacity, length = header + capacity * 3, and duplicate packed coordinate rejection.
rows.use: Verifies mined generated blocks compactly and prevents repeated mining of the same coordinate.

rows.title: BackpackAccount inventory
rows.layout: NCKBPK01, v1, 1,118 bytes; header 128; default capacity 50; max capacity 99; each resource record stores x/y/z in 10 bytes.
rows.checks: Check owner, capacity, item_count <= capacity, carried state, updated slot, and x/y/z records at records offset 128.
rows.use: Verifies inventory as a portable account and preserves coordinate-derived resource provenance.

rows.title: Guardian registry and region accounts
rows.layout: NCKGDR01 registry is 160 bytes; NCKGRG01 region is 256 bytes; includes owner/operator/global config, endpoint, stake, proof counters, and status.
rows.checks: Check registry global config, treasury token, active count, region status, owner/operator, endpoint, stake, proof interval, and region-size constants.
rows.use: Verifies guardian availability data while preserving the non-custody boundary.

rows.title: ListingAccount settlement state
rows.layout: NCKMKT01, v3, 216 bytes; stores listing state, seller, listing id, category, currency, source inventory, resource x/y/z, buyer, and sold slot.
rows.checks: Check active/canceled/sold state, seller, price, currency, source kind, source index, item hash, source inventory, and NCK token assumptions.
rows.use: Verifies listings preserve resource provenance and settlement state.
